tools.name: get_next_launches
tools.description: Live schedule of upcoming orbital rocket launches (SpaceX, NASA, Rocket Lab, ULA, Arianespace, China…) with liftoff times (UTC), pads, status and a live-tracking link. Optionally filter by provider/rocket name.

tools.name: get_iss_passes
tools.description: When the International Space Station will pass over a location in the next 3 days: start time (UTC), maximum elevation, duration, and whether the pass is in a good viewing window (evening/pre-dawn). Provide a city name OR latitude+longitude.

tools.name: get_launch_news
tools.description: Latest rocket-launch news articles (previews and post-launch recaps) from Cosmik, optionally filtered by a search term (mission, rocket, or provider name).

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_launch_news · Public sink: get_launch_news.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_launch_news · Public sink: get_launch_news

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
